UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores additional profile information for users authenticated via Firebase, linking them to specific companies or identifying them as clients.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, corresponding to the Firebase Authentication UID.

email.description: The user's email address, obtained from Firebase Authentication.

displayName.description: The user's display name or full name.

photoUrl.description: URL to the user's profile picture, if available.

role.description: The role of the user within the system (e.g., 'admin', 'client').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Company.title: Company
Company.description: Represents a salon, barbershop, or aesthetic studio registered in the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Company entity.

name.description: The name of the company (e.g., salon, barbershop).

phoneNumber.description: The main contact phone number for the company.

address.description: The physical address of the company.

plan.description: The subscription plan of the company (e.g., 'Free', 'Pro', 'Premium').

timezone.description: The IANA timezone identifier for the company's location (e.g., 'America/Sao_Paulo').

ownerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity of the user who owns or primarily manages this company.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the company record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the company record was last updated.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by a company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Service entity.

durationMinutes.description: The standard duration of the service in minutes.

basePrice.description: The base price of the service.

isActive.description: Indicates if the service is active.

Collaborator.title: Collaborator
Collaborator.description: Represents a professional working for a company.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Collaborator entity.

name.description: The full name of the collaborator.

offeredServiceIds.description: List of service IDs performed by this collaborator.
